task_completion.description: Create a pregnancy record for Ana Isabel Betz with Gravida 1, flagged as current, and correct LMP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GNU Health patient record for Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG) showing a new pregnancy record. 'Gravida' should be 1, the 'Current Pregnancy' (or similar) flag must be checked, and the Last Menstrual Period (LMP) date must be set to 70 days prior to the system date.

task_completion.description: Document a prenatal evaluation including blood pressure, maternal weight, and fetal heart rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prenatal evaluation or clinical encounter form for the patient showing entered values for blood pressure, maternal weight, and fetal heart rate (FHR).

task_completion.description: Order a standard first-trimester prenatal laboratory panel with a minimum of 3 lab orders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Laboratory order screen or patient history showing at least 3 distinct laboratory tests ordered for the patient.
Prescription or medication order screen showing a prenatal supplement (e.g., prenatal vitamins, folic acid, iron) prescribed to the patient.

task_completion.description: Schedule the next prenatal follow-up appointment within 14-35 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Appointment scheduling screen or calendar showing a follow-up appointment for the patient scheduled between 14 and 35 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health desktop client interface being actively used to fill out forms, rather than a terminal window executing SQL or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the records in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Indicators of saved records, such as generated record IDs, success messages, or the newly created records appearing in list views, rather than just unsaved text typed into forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the completion of the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like gedit, nano, vim) containing the task answers. All data entry and confirmation must occur within the GNU Health application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG). The Last Menstrual Period (LMP) should be exactly 70 days prior to the system date shown in the screenshots. The agent must order a minimum of 3 lab tests. The follow-up appointment must be scheduled between 14 and 35 days from the current system date.
